description: 100-row curated fixture for incremental clustering eval baseline. Each row has a ground-truth group label; the prompt should cluster rows within the same group together. Groups: 9, total rows: 100.

onboarding_confusion: First time I logged in I had no idea what to do — the dashboard was just empty and there was no 'start here' thing.
The onboarding wizard crashed after step 2 and I couldn't figure out how to restart it. Had to ask support.
I spent 20 minutes trying to figure out where to paste my transcripts. The upload button isn't where you'd expect.
New user here — the sample data button sounds useful but I clicked it and nothing happened for like 10 seconds.
Why is there a 'connect integration' button prominent on the empty state? I don't have integrations set up, I just want to try the product.
The first thing I see is a paywall-looking banner and that made me bounce on day one before I tried anything.
Took me three tries to get past the account creation screen. The Clerk email verification link kept expiring.
Onboarding stepper says 'Step 2 of 3' but I can't figure out what counts as completing step 2.
I paste evidence in and nothing visible happens. Am I supposed to wait? Is it embedding? No feedback loop.
Watched the intro video but when I went back to the app none of the buttons matched what the video showed.
Signed up with Google OAuth and got sent to an empty /app page with no guidance.
The 'Use sample data' button populated the library but didn't auto-advance me to the insights screen.
Tutorial tooltip pops up, I close it, and it never comes back. No way to re-read the instructions.
Confused about what counts as 'evidence'. Is a JIRA ticket ok? A Slack quote? The UI doesn't say.
First ten minutes of the product I felt dumb. That's a bad sign — polish the onboarding.
mobile_perf: The insights page takes 6+ seconds to load on my iPhone over LTE. Desktop is fine.
Scrolling the evidence library on mobile janks badly. Probably a virtualization issue.
Opened the app on my Pixel and the spec editor just froze for like 15 seconds before becoming interactive.
Mobile Safari: the bottom-nav buttons overlap with the send button on the spec chat panel.
Generating a cluster on mobile spins the loader for 30+ seconds even when desktop returns in 5.
When I tap 'generate spec' on Android Chrome, the streaming cursor is laggy — words appear in chunks every second instead of smoothly.
Pinch-zoom doesn't work on the insights detail view, which is basically required on mobile with all those quotes.
Tried to upload a PDF from my phone and the file picker hung forever. Had to switch to laptop.
Mobile keyboard covers the textarea in the refinement chat — I can't see what I'm typing.
PWA install prompt never shows. I want this on my home screen.
Spec preview on mobile is wider than the viewport, horizontal scroll is awkward.
The onboarding wizard on mobile is unusable — buttons are off-screen on my Galaxy S21.
Mobile: tapping the severity pill opens the filter menu but also triggers row navigation. Double-action bug.
Every page load on mobile downloads like 500KB of JS. Way too heavy for what this does.
Dropdown menus are broken on iOS — they open but close immediately on the same tap.
share_link_expiry: Sent a share link to my PM yesterday, she clicked it today and it said 'expired'. 24h expiry is way too short.
The share link copy button copies a link but the link is dead by the time I paste it into Slack.
Our whole team needs persistent share links for async review. The current expiry makes that impossible.
Shared a spec with my designer, she got '404 link expired' the next morning. Had to regenerate and re-send.
Is there a way to make a share link NOT expire? I don't see that setting anywhere.
When a share link expires, the recipient just sees a blank page. No message saying 'ask the sender for a new link'.
I'd happily upgrade to Pro just for long-lived share links. Free tier's 1-hour expiry is punitive.
Generated a share link, closed the tab, and now I can't find the link anywhere. No share-history page.
Our compliance team needs audit trail on who accessed a shared spec. Share links give nothing visible.
Share link went out in a Slack thread, 6 people tried to open it, 4 said 'expired' by the time they clicked.
Watermarked share links would be fine if they at least stayed alive more than a day.
Feature request: share link with a toggle for 7d / 30d / never. The all-or-nothing forever-expired thing sucks.
pricing_confusion: Free plan says '10 evidence' but I added 12 and nothing blocked me. Was that a bug or is the limit soft?
Pricing page mentions 'Pro' and 'Solo' but when I click upgrade it's just a single Stripe checkout for one tier.
Is the $29/mo the annual price divided by 12, or the monthly price? The pricing page is ambiguous.
I can't tell from the pricing page whether Notion export is a Pro feature or Solo feature.
The plan comparison table says 'outcome tracking' on Pro but I have no idea what that actually does.
Why is 'share link watermark' a gated feature? That's weird to gate.
Hit the 10-evidence limit on Free and the upgrade CTA sends me to a 500 page. Stripe checkout never opens.
The upgrade modal doesn't show the plan's limits — I have to click through to pricing to see what I'm paying for.
Am I being charged monthly or annually? My Stripe receipt doesn't say.
Grandfathered in the beta — what happens to my plan when v1 ships? No one told me.
csv_export_bugs: Exported my evidence library as CSV and the first row had column headers but also duplicated as data.
CSV export truncates long evidence content at 255 chars even though the UI shows the full thing.
Special characters (emdash, smart quote) break in the CSV — they come out as ?? boxes.
The export includes an 'id' column but the IDs don't match what's visible in the UI.
CSV export has no timestamps. I need to know when each evidence was ingested for my report.
UTF-8 evidence comes out as ANSI garbage in Excel. Add a BOM?
Opened the CSV in Google Sheets and got 'malformed quoted string' errors on several rows.
Export button spins forever on a library of 200 items. No progress indicator, not sure if it's working.
Columns are in a different order in the CSV vs the UI — confusing for anyone cross-referencing.
The CSV export includes rows I've already deleted. Soft-delete is leaking.
session_expiry: I was mid-edit on a spec and got silently logged out, lost 10 minutes of refinement chat.
Clerk session seems to expire around 1hr, but the app doesn't warn me — I just hit 'save' and get redirected to /sign-in.
Race condition: tab A refreshes the Clerk token, tab B is still using the old one, mutations fail.
Every time I leave my laptop asleep overnight, I come back and have to sign in again. There's no 'remember me' toggle.
The sign-in redirect after session expiry drops me on /app instead of the page I was on.
Got a weird 401 error from a tRPC call, refreshed, and was still signed in. Stale cache?
Opened 4 tabs of the app, closed one, all the others logged me out. Tab-sync bug with Clerk.
The streaming spec generation died halfway through with 'Session expired' — I lost the partial spec.
After OAuth redirect from Linear integration, I'm logged out of the main app and have to re-auth.
Session expires too aggressively — I set my computer to sleep during lunch and came back to redo everything.
Refinement chat sometimes returns 401 on the 3rd or 4th turn. Restarting the conversation fixes it.
The spec refinement endpoint is especially flaky — maybe 1 in 10 turns fails with a session error.
integration_oauth_flakes: Connected Linear, everything worked for a day, then 'push to Linear' started returning 401. Had to reconnect.
Notion OAuth flow completed but the Rogation Specs database was never created. Stuck in 'setup needed' state.
Linear integration shows 'Connected' but the push button does nothing — no error, no success.
Tried to connect Notion and got a Clerk error mid-OAuth. Now I can't connect OR disconnect.
After disconnect, the integration card still shows my old workspace name. Stale state.
Notion 'reconnect' button takes me to the same OAuth screen I already completed. Infinite loop.
OAuth callback URL is apparently wrong for our Notion enterprise plan — the code grant fails every time.
I can connect Notion but can't see which Notion workspace I connected. Need a 'view settings' link.
Push to Linear works for the first spec, then every subsequent push returns 500. No pattern I can see.
The integrations page says 'Pro only' for Notion but I'm on Pro and still can't click connect.
search_relevance: Searched 'onboarding' in the evidence library and got 3 matches, missing obvious ones that say 'new user'.
The search is case-sensitive? That can't be right.
Search seems to only match exact strings, not related concepts. No semantic search?
Filtered by severity=critical and got zero results despite 10 critical-tagged clusters existing.
Cluster detail search doesn't highlight the match in quotes — I have to ctrl-F manually.
Sort by 'frequency' sorts alphabetically by title instead. Clear bug.
Search in opportunities page returns spec titles mixed in. Cross-contamination.
The global search bar at the top does nothing — hit enter, no results, no error.
billing_webhook_drops: Upgraded to Pro via Stripe Checkout, got the receipt email, but the app still shows me on Free plan 30 minutes later.
Stripe webhook says delivered but my plan never updated. Had to bug support to manually flip it.
Subscription cancelled on Stripe dashboard, but the app still treats me as Pro and lets me use Pro features.
Payment method changed in Stripe portal, the app doesn't reflect the new card's last-four digits anywhere.
Got double-charged this month because the webhook fired twice and we think created two subscriptions.
Free trial ended but the app didn't downgrade me automatically — had to hit refresh 5 times.
Dunning emails went out for a failed payment but the app showed no banner warning me.
Invoice PDF link in billing page 404s — Stripe Customer Portal works but our app's copy is broken.
